'''Zaur''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Zug]] in the [[Zug system/Legends|Zug system]],<ref name="Aargau Part 1" /> which was located in the [[Arrowhead]] region, where the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] intersected [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]].<ref name="TEA" /> The planet had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and was completely covered in a [[Methane/Legends|methane]] [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]].<ref name="Aargau Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zaur was mentioned in "Three Simple Laws," the first article in the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] on [[Wizards.com]] on [[August 7]], [[2003]].<ref name="Aargau Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' later placed the Zug [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Zaur, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
